あら、司令官さま。こんにちは。<br>今日は、診療所への慰問の日なんです。:
Oh, Lord Commander, hello. Today I'm off to the clinic for a comfort
visit.
最前線での怪我や病気は、心に不安を抱えてしまいます。<br>長く入院されている方:
Injuries and illnesses on the front lines naturally cause anxiety.
Especially for those who have been hospitalized for a long time...
それに毎日、治療や看護にあたっている人たちも多くいます。<br>そんな人たちにと:
Besides, many work tirelessly every day in treatment and care. I hope
my songs can bring them even a little comfort.
今日は、各国の伝統的な曲を披露したいと思っています。<br>故郷を懐かしんで、皆:
Today I'll perform traditional songs from many lands. I want everyone
to fondly remember their homeland and sing along with ease.
司令官さまも是非立ち寄っていきませんか？<br>きっとみなさんも、司令官さまのお:
Lord Commander, won't you please stop by too? I'm sure just seeing
you will lift everyone's spirits.
